The Skia Directory

  • Docs & Bugs

    • Skia.org
    • Issue Tracker
    • Autogenerated API Documentation

  • Code Repositories

    • Git repository
    • Other Skia project repositories
    • GitHub Mirror
    • Code Search based on the version of Skia in the Chromium tree.

  • BuildBot Consoles

    • Commit Status
    • Tree Status (requires login)
    • BuildBot Console
    • FYI BuildBot Console
    • Android BuildBot Console
    • Compile BuildBot Console

  • Other

    • Fiddle Try out Skia on the web!
    • Gold Correctness testing.
    • Perf Performance testing.
    • Mon Grafana dashboard (requires login).
    • Alerts Monitor testing and bot status.
    • [BugChomper] (https://bugchomper.skia.org/) Prioritize bugs quickly.
    • Code Review

  • Mailing Lists

    • Discussion Mailing List
    • Code Review Announce List
    • Bug Announce List
